name: Godot Game Development with GDScript
description: LLM-Charge configuration optimized for Godot game development projects
setup_instructions: 1. Ensure Ollama is installed and running
2. Pull required models: ollama pull codellama:7b && ollama pull llama3.2 && ollama pull nomic-embed-text
3. Navigate to your Godot project root directory

recommended_queries.scene_analysis: Analyze this Godot scene structure and suggest improvements for performance
recommended_queries.script_optimization: Review this GDScript code for optimization opportunities and best practices
recommended_queries.signal_connections: Explain how signals work between these nodes and suggest better patterns
recommended_queries.game_mechanics: Help me implement a state machine for this character controller
recommended_queries.performance_debug: This script is causing frame drops - what could be the issue?
recommended_queries.architecture: Design a save/load system for this RPG game using GDScript

gdscript_specific_tools.node_hierarchy_analysis: Analyzes node relationships and parent-child structures
gdscript_specific_tools.signal_graph_mapping: Maps signal connections throughout the scene tree
gdscript_specific_tools.script_performance_hints: Identifies potential performance issues in GDScript
gdscript_specific_tools.godot_api_suggestions: Suggests appropriate Godot API calls for game mechanics

common_patterns.singletons: Autoload scripts for global game state management
common_patterns.state_machines: Finite state machines for character and game states
common_patterns.object_pooling: Efficient object reuse for bullets, enemies, effects
common_patterns.ui_controllers: Separation of UI logic from game logic
